lineage.method: Overlay-ablation promotion candidate: keep v5_rw_bridge_h10d train-only factor-weight estimation, h10d horizon, liquid_perp_core_20 universe, and top/bottom-3 construction; remove the W3.5 regime_gating_v2 position multiplier so the score evidence is evaluated without hand-tuned overlay throttle.
lineage.goal: Test whether the current h10d mainline should switch from regime_gating_v2 to no overlay after overlay ablation showed the no-overlay bridge has stronger full OOS cumulative return and higher period sharpe.

thesis_profile.market_mechanism: Methodology bridge for v5_h10d with no portfolio overlay. Keep the same 12-factor alpha ontology v5 score and train-only signed-IR factor weights, but remove W3.5 regime_gating_v2 so promotion evidence is not dependent on hand-tuned regime throttle parameters.
thesis_profile.directional_claim: Same long-short top-3 perp construction. Factor weights are estimated only from each split/window train segment, then applied to validation/test. Target weights are not multiplied by any regime overlay.
thesis_profile.factor_formula: For each train split/window: compute daily cross-sectional Spearman IC of each required factor z-score versus target_execution_forward_return, convert to IR = mean(IC)/std(IC), assign sign by mean(IC), normalize signed |IR| weights to abs-sum 1.0, then raw = sum(weight_f * z_f) on validation/test; final_score = tanh((percentile_rank(raw)-0.5)*1.80); target_weight_per_name = long_leverage/top_K - short_leverage/bottom_K with no position_multiplier_overlay_id.

canonical_mainline_reason: Canonical h10d methodology baseline after execution-aligned labels, ready-row feature handling, fixed-set paired comparison, and overlay ablation. Formal strict artifact 2026-04-29-xs_alpha_ontology_v5_rw_bridge_no_overlay_lsk3_g_v2_h10d passes fixed-set and overlay-ablation promotion evidence: no-overlay full-OOS cumret 1.766 / period sharpe 2.199 / recomputed WF median 3.360, beating the regime_gating_v2 bridge on cumulative return by +0.780 with sign-test p=0.0169. Use this as the default parent for future h10d candidates; regime_gating_v2 variants are comparator-only until a redesigned conservative overlay proves incremental value.
